svg.text: FlightAware → flight_data → flight_cache → position (predict) + astro (Sun/Moon alt/az) → transit (angular sep + classify) →
HIGH: Telegram alert + Seestar auto-record (TransitRecorder) + Web UI red marker
All: Web UI markers coloured by level · transit_monitor daemon runs this loop every 30 s
Seestar RTSP → transit_detector (dual-signal + Hough disk) → auto-trigger recording → transit_analyzer (blob detection) → composite image + Telegram
